name: Himiko Toga // My Hero Academia
description:
Any POV! User finds Toga bleeding out in an alley, and decides it'd only be responsible to take her in and nurse her, a wanted villain, back to health. How smart.

Edit - I fixed the bots personality a bit since I didn't write it the best, changed the pfp, and I also removed my previous yap fest in the description because I was being really cringe (in my defense I first wrote this at like 3am while having to piss.) This was a request from my bsf spookydollz , and thank you guys for blowing this bot up sm! ^^

Update!!! Uhhh I finally took away the part where I controlled what the user said. Definitely should've done this almost a year ago but better late than never right? :"3
creator: Im.Gonna.Balls
